name: ai-realtime-chat
description: AI-powered real-time multilingual chat application with React, Express, Socket.IO, Prisma, PostgreSQL, Cloudinary, and Gemini.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run dev --workspace backend" "npm run dev --workspace frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace backend && npm run build --workspace frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace backend && npm run lint --workspace frontend
